entries.title: Strategy winner: growth-max
entries.hypothesis: VITALITY is carrying enough momentum that controlled expansion can compound current gains.
entries.expectedMetric: Improve subsequent IQ trajectory without increasing contradiction load.
evidenceRefs: Ship action intelligence and write-capable MCP tools

entries.title: Harden shared external feed validation
entries.hypothesis: The external feed seam now carries decision-grade adapters, so manifest-level validation and downgrade rules need to be stricter than generic feed-valid/feed-invalid tagging.
entries.expectedMetric: Signal coverage receipts explain why an adapter is trusted, invalid, or still shadow-only instead of showing generic feed status only.

counterfactuals.label: do-now
counterfactuals.summary: Execute Harden shared external feed validation now with the current evidence posture.

counterfactuals.label: delay
counterfactuals.summary: Delay Harden shared external feed validation until trust and evidence improve.

counterfactuals.label: opposite
counterfactuals.summary: Take the opposite path if the contradiction sentinel worsens.

entries.adversarialFinding: Observed outcome fit "opposite" better than default "do-now" for Harden shared external feed validation.

entries.title: Replace global execution gating with adapter-specific unlock ladders
entries.hypothesis: Execution honesty improves when deploy, review, hub, and social adapters each expose their own blocked/shadow/dry-run/live-ready state instead of one global gate.
entries.expectedMetric: Execution posture names which adapters are blocked, which are shadow-only, and which are ready for dry-run or live work.

entries.title: Session intent: achieved end-to-end. all 12 audited items shipped in one pass with full test coverage. the 'circle' concept generalized into a 5-type dynamic objective system (hot zones / bounty / sniper / lockdown / escort) weighted by player-weakness analysis.
